input.config:
job: extension
config:
  name: "local_test_training"
  process:
    - type: sd_trainer
      device: cuda:0
      trigger_word: "test_trigger"
      training_folder: "/workspace/training_data"
      output_folder: "/workspace/output"
      network:
        type: lora
        linear: 16
        linear_alpha: 16
      save:
        dtype: float16
        save_every_n_epochs: 1
      datasets:
        - folder_path: "/workspace/training_data"
          caption_extension: ".txt"
          resolution: [512, 512]
      train:
        batch_size: 1
        steps: 100
        gradient_accumulation_steps: 4
        train_unet: true
        train_text_encoder: false
        gradient_checkpointing: true
        noise_scheduler: flowmatch
        optimizer: adamw8bit
        lr: 1e-4
